title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TAGUMPAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROXAS, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8529 / 62 OG No. 25, 4373 (June 20, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4287, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TAGUMPAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROXAS, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Buayan in the Municipality of Roxas, Province of Palawan, is hereby converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Tagumpay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
